title: Jagga Jiunda E
overview: On reaching Yamlok after his untimely death, Jagga finds out that he was called back a little too early because of a mistake made by yamraj. Soon, Jagga is sent back to the world of the living in the body of a corrupt cop, where he takes it upon himself to right the wrongs of the former police officer.
